title: Vos (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|Voss}}
'''Vos''' might refer to:
[[File:DrydenVos-Inception2022.png|thumb|280px|right|Dryden Vos]]
==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Dryden Vos]]''', a [[crime lord]] of [[Crimson Dawn]]
*'''[[Quinlan Vos]]''', a [[Jedi Master]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Clan Vos]]''', a family of [[Kiffar/Legends|Kiffar]]
**[[Tinté Vos]], a [[Sheyf]]
**[[Kurlin Vos]], a [[Sheyf]]
**[[Quinlan Vos/Legends|'''Quinlan Vos''']], a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] of Clan Vos
**[[Quian Vos]], mother of Quinlan Vos
**[[Pethros Vos]], father of Quinlan Vos
**[[Asanté Vos]], cousin of Quinlan Vos
**[[Korto Vos]], son of Quinlan Vos
